zh.lifeSummary: Johannes Peter Mohr於1702年3月7日出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯阿爾澤。他於1720年3月7日與Maria Catharina Mattheis在德國貝也普法爾茲結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1740年1月1日在美國賓夕法尼亞州約克帕拉迪瑟 堂史普享年37歲，埋葬在美國賓夕法尼亞州貝德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Johannes Peter Mohr于1702年3月7日出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯阿爾澤。他于1720年3月7日与Maria Catharina Mattheis在德国貝也普法爾茲结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1740年1月1日在美国宾夕法尼亚州約克帕拉迪瑟 堂史普享年37岁，埋葬在美国宾夕法尼亚州貝德福德。

nameMeanings.name: Mohr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone who lived in a fen, Middle Low German mōr.
German, Jewish (Ashkenazic), Danish, and Dutch (of German origin): nickname for a man of swarthy complexion, from Middle High German mōr, German Mohr, and Middle Dutch moor ‘Moor’.
German: from a short form of an old personal name, Morhart (see Morath ).

variants.name: Mor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ari, Arie, Avi, Eliezer, Erez, Etty, Haim, Hedva, Ilan, Itai, Moshe, Noam.
Jewish (Israeli): shortened and Hebraicized form of some original Ashkenazic surname starting in Mor-.

variants.name: Morath
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Gaston.  German Erhardt, Kurt.
South German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Morhart (see Morhardt ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace).

variants.name: Moerke
meanings: German (Mörke): variant of Möhrke, from a diminutive of Mohr .

nameMeanings.name: Johannes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Johannes Peter Mohr was born on 7 March 1702, in Alzey, Alzey-Worms, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. He married Maria Catharina Mattheis on 7 March 1720, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 1 January 1740, in Paradise Township, York, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 37, and was buried in Bedford, Pennsylvania, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Johannes Peter Mohr est né le 7 mars 1702, à Alzey, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Il a épousé Maria Catharina Mattheis le 7 mars 1720, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1740, à Paradise Township, York, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Bedford, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Johannes Peter Mohr wurde am 7. März 1702 in Alzey, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren. Er hat am 7. März 1720 in Pfalz, Bayern, Deutschland Maria Catharina Mattheis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Januar 1740 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Paradise Township, York, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Bedford, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Johannes Peter Mohr è nato il il 7 marzo 1702 nel Alzey, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania. Lui sposato Maria Catharina Mattheis il 7 marzo 1720, nel Pfalz, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 1 gennaio 1740, nel Paradise Township, York, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Bedford, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Johannes Peter Mohrは1702年3月7日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス アルズエイ-ウオルムズアルズエイで生まれた。1720年3月7日にドイツバイエルンプファルズでMaria Catharina Mattheisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1740年1月1日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ヨークパーアディゼ トウンシュイップで37歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ベドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johannes Peter Mohr(은)는 1702년 3월 7일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 알즈이-워스 알즈이에서 태어났다. 그는 1720년 3월 7일 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 Maria Catharina Mattheis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1740년 1월 1일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 요르크 파라디스 타운시프에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 펜실베이니아 주 베드퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Johannes Peter Mohr nasceu em 7 de março de 1702, em Alzey, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Ele casou-se com Maria Catharina Mattheis em 7 de março de 1720, em Pfalz, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1740, em Paradise Township, York, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Bedford, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Johannes Peter Mohr родился 7 марта 1702 г. в местности алзи, ландкрис алзи-вормс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Catharina Mattheis 7 марта 1720 г. в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 1 января 1740 г. в местности парадис тоуншип, ерк, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности бедфорд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты.
